agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Audit runtime behavior, control flow, and API correctness for the 20260410-170148 batch scope.

findings.title: Onboarding cluster POST returns artifacts but does not persist them on the server
findings.description: POST /api/projects/[name]/onboarding/cluster collects cluster-specific artifacts (git history, manifests, CSS tokens) and returns them in JSON. The handler documents that a full implementation would save into the Project model; without that, only the client retains the payload across navigation unless it re-fetches or stores locally.

proof_hooks.summary: Handler comment: save to project.clusterArtifacts deferred; response-only today
Success response returns artifacts without repo.update persistence

history.notes: Re-audit batch logic-20260410-170148; scope from LATEST.md focus paths.

next_actions.action: Decide whether cluster snapshots must be persisted via getRepository().update before leaving onboarding.
next_actions.rationale: Avoid silent loss of collected artifacts when the client does not hold them.

next_actions.action: Confirm fixed_pending_verify items f-2c1c5aa4 (assigned in TS + route) via synthesizer merge.
next_actions.rationale: FindingStatus and VALID_STATUSES now include assigned; aligns with DB enum.
